entities.name: Multi-step orchestration
entities.context: Architecture pattern using multiple low-capability models for granular error correction and specialized sub-task execution

entities.name: Model asymmetry
entities.context: Principle of using different model capabilities strategically across sub-tasks

entities.name: Chain of Thought architecture
entities.context: Alternative name for multi-agent architecture that distributes cognitive load across inference passes

entities.name: Single-shot prompts
entities.context: Contrasting approach using one inference pass to high-end models

entities.name: 4o-mini
entities.context: Example of a small model that can be tuned for specific mechanical tasks

entities.name: Frontier models
entities.context: High-capability models that may exhibit hallucination or laziness on complex reasoning

entities.name: Hallucination
entities.context: Failure mode of large monolithic models attempting complex reasoning in one pass

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company whose technical architecture should bias toward complex workflows using cheaper models

relationships.context: Orchestration enables model asymmetry through distributed complexity

Small models serve as building blocks in orchestrated workflows
Large models exhibit hallucination when attempting complex reasoning monolithically
